nodes.name: Filter: By Agent Type and Groups

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', max_tokens: 150, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.scenario.callerPrompt + ' Keep each response to 1-3 sentences. Be natural. This is an HVAC company phone call.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'The HVAC receptionist answers the phone and says: "Thank you for calling, this is ' + ($json.agentType === 'premium' ? 'your company' : 'Arctic Breeze HVAC') + ', how can I help you today?" Respond as the caller now.' } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 300, system: $json.scenario.agentPrompt || 'You are an HVAC receptionist AI. Follow your prompt exactly.', messages: [ { role: 'user', content: $('n-simulate-caller').first().json.choices[0].message.content } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', max_tokens: 150, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.scenario.callerPrompt + ' Keep responses to 1-3 sentences.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Caller said: ' + $('n-simulate-caller').first().json.choices[0].message.content }, { role: 'assistant', content: 'I said that.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Agent responded: ' + $('n-agent-response').first().json.content[0].text + '. Continue the conversation as the caller.' } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 300, system: $json.scenario.agentPrompt || 'You are an HVAC receptionist AI.', messages: [ { role: 'user', content: $('n-simulate-caller').first().json.choices[0].message.content }, { role: 'assistant', content: $('n-agent-response').first().json.content[0].text }, { role: 'user', content: $('n-groq-turn2').first().json.choices[0].message.content } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 600, system: 'You are a strict QA evaluator for an HVAC AI receptionist. Evaluate the conversation transcript against the expected behaviour. Respond ONLY with valid JSON in this exact format: {"pass": true/false, "score": 0-100, "severity": "PASS"|"LOW"|"MEDIUM"|"HIGH"|"CRITICAL", "issues": ["issue description"], "fix_needed": "specific prompt change needed or empty string if pass", "root_cause": "root cause if fail or empty string"}. Be strict. A pass means the agent did EXACTLY what was expected.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'SCENARIO: ' + $json.scenario.name + '

EXPECTED BEHAVIOUR: ' + $json.scenario.expectedBehaviour + '

CONVERSATION TRANSCRIPT:
Caller: ' + $('n-simulate-caller').first().json.choices[0].message.content + '
Agent: ' + $('n-agent-response').first().json.content[0].text + '
Caller: ' + $('n-groq-turn2').first().json.choices[0].message.content + '
Agent: ' + $('n-agent-turn2').first().json.content[0].text + '

Evaluate this conversation.' }] }) }}
